body_excerpt: In dhd_prot_flowrings_pool_release of dhd_msgbuf.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In dhd_prot_flowrings_pool_release of dhd_msgbuf.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution
